title: cirrus setup: special-case perl unicode
body:
Perl is still stuck in the 1980s. Try to override that.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Confirmed: [this log line](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6086110799986688?logs=main#L718) shows the beta character, and [the colorized log title](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6086110799986688/html/sys-remote-fedora-39%CE%B2-rootless-host-boltdb.log.html) (as in, browser title) also. Prior to this PR, those were [garbled](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6319415201890304/html/int-podman-fedora-39%CE%B2-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html).
LGTM. Total success seems stuck, restarting.

Oh
⚠️ Failed to start an instance: FAILED_PRECONDITION: Monthly free compute limit exceeded!

Huh.
